articles.title: JK Capital Finance Locks in P300-million credit guarantee
articles.author: admin
articles.excerpt: JK Capital Finance secures a P300-million credit guarantee to strengthen SME financing in the Philippines.

articles.title: Daddy’s Best Nature Farm Scales Agriculture Operations With JK Capital Finance
articles.author: admin
articles.excerpt: Daddy’s Best Nature Farm is revolutionizing sustainable farming practices in the Philippines. Set on a lush 17-hectare property in San Clemente, Tarlac, the farm marries regenerative agricultural techniques with a strong commitment to social impact.

articles.title: Excelucent Equipment Corporation Secures Growth Funding from JK Capital Finance
articles.author: admin
articles.excerpt: Excelucent Equipment Corporation (EEC), a key player in construction machinery distribution and rentals, has successfully renewed its partnership with JK Capital Finance to secure funding for enhanced operational capabilities.

articles.title: JK Capital and INVENIC Strengthen Partnership to Accelerate Solar and Renewable Energy Projects in the Philippines
articles.author: admin
articles.excerpt: JK Capital Finance, Inc., a leading provider of business loans and structured financing solutions for SMEs, has renewed its partnership with INVENIC, one of the country’s foremost EPC companies for solar and environmental systems.
